Declares a namespace package using `pkg_resources`.

# Purpose
This code is a namespace package declaration using the `pkg_resources` module from the `setuptools` library. It defines a namespace package, which allows multiple separate distributions to provide modules and sub-packages under a common package name. The `declare_namespace(__name__)` function call indicates that the package is a namespace package, enabling the package to be split across multiple directories or distributions. This is useful for organizing large projects or libraries that are distributed across multiple packages.
